accepted.reason: Document scoring/ranking loops are reusable indexing kernels with clear optimization value.
Basic vector arithmetic kernels (saxpy/dot) are compact, high-signal numeric workloads.
Graph partition objective and balance penalty loops are useful optimization-task examples.
Radial profile accumulation captures practical astrophysical numeric aggregation patterns.
Pixel-wise alpha blending is a common image-processing kernel with dense loops.
Sum-tree build/update/sample operations are important RL data-structure kernels.

skipped.reason: Cython method-mangling test cases are not suitable as standalone optimization targets.
Compiler/runtime behavior tests have low transfer value for conversion training.
Example plugin scaffold code is integration-heavy and not a robust numeric kernel exemplar.
Game-piece rule logic is domain-specific and less aligned with Cython speedup-focused trace goals.
